hero.title: Knowledge as a path to freedom
hero.subtitle: IQRA TOGO guides students, supports orphans and builds the capacity of beneficiaries for a more educated and liberated Togo.

home.quote: Because knowledge is the key to all freedoms — we act every day so that every Togolese child can learn, grow and flourish.

pillars.title: What drives us
pillars.subtitle: IQRA TOGO acts at the heart of Togolese communities around three pillars of change.
pillars.p1_text: We accompany students in their academic journey so they can build their future with confidence.
pillars.p2_text: Material and financial aid for vulnerable children to ensure their dignity, protection and access to education.
pillars.p3_text: Practical training and workshops to develop the skills of beneficiaries and foster their independence.

impact.title: Numbers that speak
impact.subtitle: Every year, our commitment translates into concrete actions and measurable results.

mission.title: What drives us
mission.p1: IQRA TOGO works to ensure that every Togolese child has access to knowledge, every orphan is supported, and every beneficiary can develop their capacities.
mission.p2: Every year, we support hundreds of beneficiaries through our guidance, support and capacity-building programs.

donate.title: Support our mission
donate.subtitle: Every donation directly contributes to education and well-being for Togolese children and families.
donate.section_subtitle: 1,000 FCFA can cover school supplies for an orphan for one month. Every gesture counts, no matter its size.
donate.bullet3: Full transparency on how funds are used

newsletter.title: Stay informed
newsletter.subtitle: Receive our news, impact reports and event invitations.
newsletter.privacy: No spam. Unsubscribe at any time.

footer.description: Togolese association working for academic guidance, support for orphans and capacity building. Motto: Knowledge is Freedom.

about.title: About Us
about.origins_subtitle: A look back at the key milestones that shaped the identity of IQRA TOGO.
about.mission_text: To give every Togolese child and young person the resources and support needed to access knowledge, exercise their freedom and build their future.
about.vision_text: A Togo where every child is guided on the right path, no orphan is left behind, and every citizen has the capacity to flourish.
about.programs_subtitle: Three priority pillars driven by IQRA TOGO's motto: Knowledge is Freedom.
about.cta_subtitle: Whether you are a professional, student, engaged citizen or company — there is a place for you in IQRA TOGO.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: Men and women committed to the same conviction: knowledge sets you free.
team.join_subtitle: Would you like to contribute to our mission? We would be delighted to consider your application.
